def naturalNumber(n):
    ans = int( n*(n+1)/2)
    print(ans)
    return ans
naturalNumber(5)
def sum_Odd_num(n):
    odd_or_even =  int(n/2) if n % 2 == 0 else int((n/2)) + 1
    ans = odd_or_even * odd_or_even
    print(ans)
    return ans

label: sum_Odd_num
peekOfCode:
def sum_Odd_num(n):
    odd_or_even =  int(n/2) if n % 2 == 0 else int((n/2)) + 1
    ans = odd_or_even * odd_or_even
    print(ans)
    return ans
sum_Odd_num(5)
def sum_even_num(n):
    ans = naturalNumber(n) - sum_Odd_num(n)
    print(ans)
sum_even_num(5)
